caption: The video depicts a medical simulation session, likely part of a "Sim Week" program designed for students transitioning to residency. In a clinical setting, a group of individuals dressed in surgical scrubs and masks are engaged in a hands-on training exercise. One person is performing an ultrasound on a mannequin, while others observe and assist. The environment is equipped with medical instruments and supplies, emphasizing a realistic learning experience. The participants appear focused and collaborative, working together to enhance their skills in a controlled, educational environment. The scene underscores the importance of practical training in preparing future healthcare professionals for real-world scenarios.
